Manager of Solo Instance Zones Karinia:
You have chosen the Forsaken Cave of Trials.
This instance zone is available to warriors who have complete the Rescue the Captives main quest.
The rewards and ranking are determined by the completion speed. If you are not satisfied with your result, you may decline the reward and try again.
Note! When you enter the instance zone, regular buffs and the Tenacity Reward buff will be removed.
